results.what: Ran hyperparameter sensitivity sweep: 5 model variants (learning rate and hidden dim combinations).
results.result: All 5 variants: 1–3% accuracy. Best: lr=1e-4, hidden_dim=256, 3.1% accuracy.
results.interpretation: sqrt-prop global architecture is broken at all tested hyperparameter settings. Dead end — architecture must be replaced.

dashboard_status_line: Active — sqrt-prop global sensitivity done; architecture dead end confirmed; new architecture needed.
